pages.storyText: Leo was a brave lion cub with a golden mane and a bright green scarf, but he had one big weakness: sugary snacks. One afternoon, instead of eating his crunchy salad, he went searching for the legendary 'Infinite Candy Jar' hidden in his attic.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation of a cute lion cub with a golden mane and a bright green scarf. He is in a cozy, sunlit wooden attic, looking excitedly at an old, dusty glass jar filled with colorful candies. The cub has large expressive eyes. High detail, soft cinematic lighting, vibrant colors.

pages.storyText: Suddenly, a tiny blue bird named Pip, wearing a small gold crown, fluttered down. 'Stop!' Pip chirped. 'That jar is a portal to the Sticky Kingdom. If you go there, you might never want to leave, but you will lose your roar!' Leo didn't listen and touched the jar.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. The golden lion cub with the green scarf is reaching for a glowing glass jar. A small, vibrant blue bird with a tiny gold crown is hovering near his face, looking worried. The background is a dusty attic with sunbeams filtering through a small window. Vibrant colors, high detail.

pages.storyText: In a flash, Leo was transported to a land where the ground was made of chocolate and the clouds were cotton candy. Everything looked delicious! Leo started eating everything in sight, from gummy bushes to soda fountains, while Pip watched sadly from a lollipop tree.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. A whimsical landscape where the ground is dark brown chocolate and trees are made of giant pink and red lollipops. The golden lion cub with a green scarf is happily eating a bush made of green gummy bears. A small blue bird with a crown sits on a lollipop branch in the background. Bright, saturated neon colors.

pages.storyText: After an hour of snacking, Leo felt strange. His golden fur was turning a dull, sticky gray, and his legs felt heavy like lead. When he tried to roar, only a tiny 'squeak' came out. He felt tired, grumpy, and his tummy began to ache terribly.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. The lion cub with the green scarf looks tired and sluggish. His golden fur is now a messy, matted gray color with bits of candy stuck to it. He is sitting on a chocolate rock, holding his stomach with a sad expression. The candy forest around him looks dim and less inviting. Cinematic lighting, expressive character design.

pages.storyText: The Sugar King appeared, a giant marshmallow man with a frosting cape. 'Welcome!' he boomed. 'Stay here forever and eat only sugar!' But as the King stepped closer, a piece of his frosting fell off, revealing a sad, wilted celery stick hidden underneath. The King was a prisoner of his own snacks!
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. A giant, round marshmallow man wearing a purple frosting cape stands before the cub. A piece of the marshmallow skin is peeling away to reveal a green, wilted celery stick inside. The background features a sky made of swirling purple soda clouds. Dramatic lighting, high detail.

pages.storyText: Pip the bird pointed to a distant, glowing hill. 'The only cure is the Golden Apple of Energy!' Pip cried. Leo tried to run, but he was too slow from all the sugar. He realized he needed to find real strength, not just a sugar rush.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. The gray, sticky lion cub is looking toward a distant, bright green hill where a single tree glows with a golden light. The small blue bird with a crown is pointing towards the hill. The foreground is a sticky swamp of melted caramel. High contrast, epic scale, vibrant green light in the distance.

pages.storyText: Leo found a small patch of real spinach growing by a stream of fresh water. He took a brave bite. Slowly, the gray faded from his fur, and his golden glow returned. He felt a spark of real energy and sprinted toward the glowing hill, leaving the candy world behind.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. The lion cub is eating bright green spinach leaves near a clear, sparkling blue water stream. His fur is turning back to a bright, shiny gold, and his green scarf is fluttering. He looks determined and energetic. The candy world in the background is blurry and dark. Bright, hopeful lighting.

pages.storyText: At the top of the hill, Leo shared the Golden Apple with the Sugar King. As they ate, the Marshmallow Man transformed back into a strong, healthy Broccoli Knight! The sticky kingdom melted away, turning into a beautiful garden of fruits and vegetables.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. The lion cub and a tall, heroic knight made of vibrant green broccoli are standing on a lush green hill. They are sharing a glowing golden apple. The landscape around them is transforming from candy into a beautiful orchard with apple trees and vegetable patches. Soft, magical glowing effects.

pages.storyText: Leo woke up in his attic, the dusty jar now empty. He ran downstairs and headed straight for his bowl of carrots. He took a big, crunchy bite and let out a mighty roar that shook the whole house. He felt stronger and happier than ever before.
pages.imagePrompt: 3D Pixar-style digital animation. The golden lion cub with the green scarf is back in his sunny kitchen. He is happily eating a bright orange carrot. He has a wide smile and looks very healthy. A bowl of varied fruits and vegetables is on the table. The small blue bird with a crown is perched on the window sill, looking happy. Warm, cheerful morning light.
